basic_details.job_title: IHMCL Chief Information Security Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Highways Management Company Limited (IHMCL) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in engineering in Computer Science / Information Technology / Electronics & Communication / Information Security / Cyber Security / Telecommunications / MCA or equivalent, with professional certifications and Master's degree in relevant fields.
qualification.details: Chief Information Security Officer (CISO): Bachelor's degree in engineering in Computer Science / Information Technology / Electronics & Communication / Information Security / Cyber Security / Telecommunications / MCA or equivalent from a recognized University/Institute. Possession of one or more internationally recognized professional certifications such as CISSP / CISM / CISA / CCSP / CEH / ISO 27001 Lead Auditor / Lead Implementer / Security+ / GIAC / Cloud Security (AWS/Azure/GCP) / AI/ML Security / Digital Transformation / Data Analytics or equivalent industry-recognized certifications. Minimum 15 years professional experience in Information Technology / Information Security / Cyber Security / Digital Infrastructure / Technology Governance / Enterprise Risk Management / Digital Payments / Critical Infrastructure / Cloud or Enterprise Technology, in large corporate / PSU / autonomous / Government bodies. Out of this, at least 5 years should be in senior leadership / managerial responsibility for cyber security, technology governance, cyber risk, security operations, audit/compliance or digital infrastructure.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IHMCL Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IHMCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IHMCL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IHMCL Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IHMCL Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IHMCL Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Chief Information Security Officer (CISO): Bachelor's degree in engineering in Computer Science / Information Technology / Electronics & Communication / Information Security / Cyber Security / Telecommunications / MCA or equivalent from a recognized University/Institute. Possession of one or more internationally recognized professional certifications such as CISSP / CISM / CISA / CCSP / CEH / ISO 27001 Lead Auditor / Lead Implementer / Security+ / GIAC / Cloud Security (AWS/Azure/GCP) / AI/ML Security / Digital Transformation / Data Analytics or equivalent industry-recognized certifications. Minimum 15 years professional experience in Information Technology / Information Security / Cyber Security / Digital Infrastructure / Technology Governance / Enterprise Risk Management / Digital Payments / Critical Infrastructure / Cloud or Enterprise Technology, in large corporate / PSU / autonomous / Government bodies. Out of this, at least 5 years should be in senior leadership / managerial responsibility for cyber security, technology governance, cyber risk, security operations, audit/compliance or digital infrastructure.

content_sections.heading: IHMCL Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IHMCL Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IHMCL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IHMCL Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IHMCL CISO recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the online application for the IHMCL Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) recruitment is 09 August 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the CISO post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in engineering in relevant fields like Computer Science, IT, or equivalent, along with professional certifications and a Master's degree in Information Security or related disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Chief Information Security Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) post is 50 years as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the IHMCL CISO recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IHMCL Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the CISO post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) post will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 100000 to Rs. 260000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the CISO post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) in the Indian Highways Management Company Limited (IHMCL).

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IHMCL Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the CISO role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) position involves Selection and Lateral Induction as mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum professional experience required for the CISO post?
faq.answer: A minimum of 15 years of professional experience in Information Technology, Information Security, Cyber Security, or related fields is required, with at least 5 years in senior leadership roles.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
